llm_verdict.message: The remediation has been applied. The `even_deny_root` option has been added to the `pam_faillock.so` entries in both **/etc/pam.d/system-auth** and **/etc/pam.d/password-auth**, ensuring the root account will be locked after failed password attempts as required by the `accounts_passwords_pam_faillock_deny_root` rule. Verification via `grep` shows the expected lines now contain `even_deny_root`.
